news.title:
Power Grid Corp granted regulatory relaxation by SEBI, easing operational constraints.
The move aims to facilitate smoother corporate governance for Power Grid Corp.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp granted regulatory relaxation by SEBI, easing operational constraints.
The move aims to facilitate smoother corporate governance for Power Grid Corp.

news.title:
POWERGRID's board meeting on March 9, 2026, to discuss fund raising plans.
Trading window closed March 4-11, reopening March 12, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
POWERGRID's board meeting on March 9, 2026, to discuss fund raising plans.
Trading window closed March 4-11, reopening March 12, per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
PM Modi inaugurated ₹3,600 cr Powergrid projects in Rajasthan to enhance solar energy transmission.
Projects include a transmission system for evacuating 20 GW from REZ, featuring Bhadla III substation and Sikar II line.
news.summary:
PM Modi inaugurated ₹3,600 cr Powergrid projects in Rajasthan to enhance solar energy transmission.
Projects include a transmission system for evacuating 20 GW from REZ, featuring Bhadla III substation and Sikar II line.

news.title:
Power Grid received SEBI relaxation under Regulation 102 for compliance norms.
Specific relaxed norms include Regulation 17, 10, and 25 4 a, b as per SEBI approval.
news.summary:
Power Grid received SEBI relaxation under Regulation 102 for compliance norms.
Specific relaxed norms include Regulation 17, 10, and 25 4 a, b as per SEBI approval.

news.title:
Power Grid Corp fined Rs.5.43L+GST by BSE, NSE for Dec'25 board non-compliance.
Independent director vacancies unfilled; requested fine waiver citing govt appointment control.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp fined Rs.5.43L+GST by BSE, NSE for Dec'25 board non-compliance.
Independent director vacancies unfilled; requested fine waiver citing govt appointment control.

news.title:
Tata Sons deferred reappointing N Chandrasekaran; Noel Tata raised concerns.
POWERGRID gets investment clearance; Lupin, Dr Reddy’s gain US FDA, SEC approvals.
news.summary:
Tata Sons deferred reappointing N Chandrasekaran; Noel Tata raised concerns.
POWERGRID gets investment clearance; Lupin, Dr Reddy’s gain US FDA, SEC approvals.

news.title:
POWERGRID Narela Transmission Ltd, a subsidiary of Power Grid Corporation of India, has fully commissioned its project.
The project, part of Rajasthan's solar zone strengthening scheme (8.1 GW), became operational on 7th Dec 2025.
news.summary:
POWERGRID Narela Transmission Ltd, a subsidiary of Power Grid Corporation of India, has fully commissioned its project.
The project, part of Rajasthan's solar zone strengthening scheme (8.1 GW), became operational on 7th Dec 2025.

news.title:
CCEA approved enhanced delegation to Power Grid Corporation of India (PGCIL).
This allows PGCIL to bid for HVDC and UHVDC high-capital projects.
news.summary:
CCEA approved enhanced delegation to Power Grid Corporation of India (PGCIL).
This allows PGCIL to bid for HVDC and UHVDC high-capital projects.

news.title:
India Cabinet approves higher investment limit for Power Grid Corp.
Move aims to improve energy infrastructure and power transmission efficiency.
news.summary:
India Cabinet approves higher investment limit for Power Grid Corp.
Move aims to improve energy infrastructure and power transmission efficiency.

news.title:
Govt raises Powergrid equity threshold to Rs 7,500 crore per subsidiary to fund large projects.
Move supports India's 500 GW non-fossil energy target by 2030, boosting renewable energy evacuation.
news.summary:
Govt raises Powergrid equity threshold to Rs 7,500 crore per subsidiary to fund large projects.
Move supports India's 500 GW non-fossil energy target by 2030, boosting renewable energy evacuation.

news.title:
Sensex gains 650 points; Nifty closes above 25,650.
Power Grid rises 4%, while HDFC Bank gains 2%.
news.summary:
Sensex gains 650 points; Nifty closes above 25,650.
Power Grid rises 4%, while HDFC Bank gains 2%.

news.title: POWERGRID acquires Bellary-Davanagere Transmission SPV for ₹13.02 cr.
news.summary: POWERGRID acquires Bellary-Davanagere Transmission SPV for ₹13.02 cr.

news.title:
POWERGRID fully acquired BDPTL, a transmission project, enhancing Karnataka's renewable energy integration.
Acquisition was under Tariff Based Competitive Bidding to strengthen power transmission systems.
news.summary:
POWERGRID fully acquired BDPTL, a transmission project, enhancing Karnataka's renewable energy integration.
Acquisition was under Tariff Based Competitive Bidding to strengthen power transmission systems.

news.title:
Fitch affirms Power Grid's credit rating at 'BBB-' with stable outlook.
This reflects confidence in Power Grid's financial stability and management.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms Power Grid's credit rating at 'BBB-' with stable outlook.
This reflects confidence in Power Grid's financial stability and management.

news.title:
POWERGRID wins bid for Pune Region-I Transmission Project in Maharashtra.
This achievement strengthens POWERGRID's position in the energy sector.
news.summary:
POWERGRID wins bid for Pune Region-I Transmission Project in Maharashtra.
This achievement strengthens POWERGRID's position in the energy sector.

news.title:
India plans its first cross-sector Invit under NMP 2.0, led by NITI Aayog.
This marks a shift from ministry-specific Invits under NMP 2022-25.
news.summary:
India plans its first cross-sector Invit under NMP 2.0, led by NITI Aayog.
This marks a shift from ministry-specific Invits under NMP 2022-25.

news.title:
Power Grid Corporation of India (POWERGRID) wins TBCB bid for Maharashtra's transmission project.
Project includes a 765/400kV AIS substation, transmission lines, and bay extensions in Maharashtra.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corporation of India (POWERGRID) wins TBCB bid for Maharashtra's transmission project.
Project includes a 765/400kV AIS substation, transmission lines, and bay extensions in Maharashtra.

news.title:
Power Grid executed a block trade of 2,080,953 shares at Rs. 291.1.
The total value of the trade amounted to Rs. 60.6 crores.
news.summary:
Power Grid executed a block trade of 2,080,953 shares at Rs. 291.1.
The total value of the trade amounted to Rs. 60.6 crores.

news.title:
Power Grid's gross fixed assets exceeded ₹3T, leading in transmission globally.
FY26 CapEx targets ₹32,000 cr; Q3 income rose 7% with strong government support.
news.summary:
Power Grid's gross fixed assets exceeded ₹3T, leading in transmission globally.
FY26 CapEx targets ₹32,000 cr; Q3 income rose 7% with strong government support.

news.title:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.
news.summary:
India's draft National Electricity Policy proposes Rs 200 trillion investment by 2047 in generation, transmission, distribution, and renewables.
Stocks like NTPC, Tata Power, Adani Power, Power Grid, Torrent Power, and JSW Energy may benefit from sector reforms and capacity expansions.
